title: quercus ilex f. calicina
intro: Quercus ilex f. calicina, also known as the holm oak or evergreen oak, is a subspecies of the holm oak tree (Quercus ilex) native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus ilex f. calicina include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
